title: Is there a way to track who has opened a file for each item
excerpt: I need to track who has opened and read a document in the Files Column. I know if I have them make a comment for each file they open that will show in the activity log but is there any other way to see who has read the d…

posts.author: RickAllen (Rick Allen)
posts.cookedHtml: I need to track who has opened and read a document in the Files Column. I know if I have them make a comment for each file they open that will show in the activity log but is there any other way to see who has read the document in the activity log?

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: I don’t know of a way to do that. I even just double checked the custom automations and templates. I’d recommend submitting this on Feature Requests. Feature requests - monday Community Forum
